rationale: Review 1 identifies three grounded placement problems — wrong directory, foundational `AffineAlgGroup`/`AlgPoints` in a reductive-named file, and `IsUnipotent` co-located with reductive/semisimple stubs — all verifiable in the diff; acting on it yields a properly layered module structure. Review 2 only catches the directory deviation (its other finding is an import issue outside the placement rubric), so following it leaves the within-file layering problems unaddressed.
